summary: Iteration 35 — Sync Diff overlay (mapHistory ring buffer + sync-pulled event + Undo toast) regression + smoke pass. All unit, backend, and frontend regression checks green.

test_results.unit_map_history_mjs: 9/9 passed (empty-read, push, newest-first, cap=10, pop, pop-empty, clearHistoryFor, isolation, deep-copy)
test_results.pytest_test_sync: 8/8 passed (free_user_gets_402, status_disabled_for_free, push_pull_roundtrip, lww_keeps_server_newer, since_filter, tombstone_pull, user_isolation, purge_old_tombstones)
test_results.event_dispatch_signed_out: PASS — CustomEvent('mindmapper:sync-pulled') dispatched with no runtime error; [data-testid=sync-badge] correctly absent for signed-out user
test_results.library_state_after_dispatch: PASS — localStorage.mindmapper.maps.v1 contains title='NEW'; mindmapper.mapHistory.v1.m1 has 1 snapshot with title='OLD'
test_results.studio_canvas_load: PASS — /app?unlock=mind-mapper67 loads, 6 seed node elements rendered, no runtime error banner
test_results.regression_pages: PASS — /memory (200), /download (200), /tools (200), /highlights (200) all render with usePageMeta titles, no runtime errors

notes.console_401_on_regression_pages: Expected — /api/me or /api/sync/status calls for unauthenticated users return 401. Non-blocking.
notes.canvas_bg_testid: Queried `[data-testid=canvas-bg]` returned null but broader node query found 6 seed nodes (primary assertion). If E1 wants strict canvas-bg testid coverage, add data-testid to the canvas wrapper; minor nit only.
notes.toast_undo_e2e: Not E2E-tested (requires Pro auth as documented); library-layer coverage via event + localStorage validation is green.

critical_code_review_comments: Optional: add `data-testid="canvas-bg"` to the canvas wrapper div for more robust future regression selectors (current regression sweep still works via node count).
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral localStorage seed inside browser during event-dispatch probe (mindmapper.mapHistory.v1, mindmapper.maps.v1 for mapId=m1); not persisted in backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sync Diff overlay is stable at library + event layer. For Pro-user E2E (toast visibility + Undo click flow), a real authenticated session is needed; current coverage stops at event dispatch contract + localStorage state.
